title: delphinium pubescens subsp. loscosii
intro: Delphinium pubescens subsp. loscosii, also known as the alpine delphinium or Spanish delphinium, is a subspecies of the perennial plant Delphinium pubescens, native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory agent, to treat conditions such as bronchitis and arthritis. The health benefits of Delphinium pubescens subsp. loscosii include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its roots and flowers in hot water or using them in tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
